purpose: Clear the pending-direct-invite marker for a profile's author when the invitee's own signed profile arrives via the profile rumor handler, independent of the LWW merge outcome and never on the basis of rumor.pubkey alone (relay-on-behalf safety).

public_api.name: ProfileHandlerDeps.clearPendingDirectInvite
public_api.description: New injected dependency (added to the existing ProfileHandlerDeps interface). Called by handle() after mergeMemberProfile, gated on profilePayload.signedEvent being present and signedEvent.pubkey equal to the marked pubkey. Best-effort: a rejection is caught and logged, never rethrown.

public_api.name: createProfileHandler
public_api.description: Unchanged public factory signature; deps object shape grows by one field (clearPendingDirectInvite).

dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/marmot/pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts (clearPendingDirectInvite export, consumed only via registerHandlers.ts wiring — never imported directly into profileHandler.ts)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/context/* (profileHandler.ts remains zero-import from context per its header contract)
direct import of pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts into profileHandler.ts itself
